violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (rice) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Sushi is served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Multiple glue fly traps were observed hanging in food prep area. PIC removed glue traps. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
Knives were observed stored between prep unit. Knives were removed and relocated to dish washer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
